name: Palindrome Linked List
description: Given the head of a singly linked list, return true if it is a palindrome. Can you do it in O(n) time and O(1) space? Hint: find middle, reverse second half, compare.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 10^5]. 0 <= Node.val <= 9.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long palindromic and near-palindromic lists that punish repeated symmetry rescans instead of reverse-half or stack-based linear checks
